app.name: Open Persona
app.tagline: Typed-memory AI personas with a tier-routed runtime.

scaffold.title: Open Persona — web app
scaffold.subtitle: Scaffold is live. Auth, personas, chat, runs, and authoring land in the spec-09 tasks.

landing.headline: AI personas with a memory you can read.
landing.subhead: Open Persona gives every agent a typed identity, a worldview, and episodic memory — then routes each turn to the right model tier.

identity.title: Identity is data
identity.body: Name, worldview, self-facts, and constraints live in typed, versioned stores — not buried in a prompt you can't inspect.

tools.title: Transparent tools
tools.body: Every tool call and its result stream inline, collapsed by default. Transparency without the noise — no black box.

runs.title: Agentic runs
runs.body: Hand off a task and watch the plan-act-reflect loop unfold step by step, answering its questions as it works.

routing.title: Tier-routed
routing.body: Each turn runs on the right model — small, mid, or frontier — so you spend on power only when a turn needs it.

landing.ctaTitle: Give your AI a self worth trusting.
landing.footer: Open source · built on a typed-memory core.

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountHint: Manage your account from the avatar menu in the header.
settings.creditsHint: Credits are spent per turn, by model tier.
settings.themeHint: Light, dark, or follow your system.
settings.tierBadgesHint: Show which tier answered each turn in chat.
settings.languageHint: English ships now; the pseudo-locale verifies full i18n coverage.
settings.usageEmpty: No usage yet — start a conversation or a run.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Every chat you've had with your personas.
conversations.emptyHint: Open a persona and start a chat.

personas.title: Personas
personas.subtitle: Your typed-memory agents.
personas.emptyHint: Describe one in a sentence and the authoring flow drafts the rest.

runs.taskPlaceholder: Describe a task for {name} to carry out…

author.describeHint: One or two sentences. The frontier model drafts the identity, worldview, and constraints — you refine from there.
author.describePlaceholder: e.g. A warm but rigorous Norwegian tenancy-law assistant who never gives binding legal advice…
author.example1: A patient Python tutor for absolute beginners who explains with small runnable examples.
author.example2: A blunt startup advisor who pressure-tests ideas and always asks about distribution.
author.example3: A Norwegian tenancy-law assistant who cites husleieloven and never gives binding advice.
author.authorError: Authoring failed. Try rephrasing your description.
author.rateLimited: Too many authoring requests — wait a moment and try again.
author.name: Name
author.yamlInvalid: Invalid YAML — the form keeps its last valid state. {error}
author.refineSoon: Clarifying questions and an iterative refinement loop arrive in a later release.

chat.error: Something went wrong while streaming. The conversation was reloaded.
